signals.headline: South Korea’s Annual Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea’s Annual Inflation Rises to 2.2% in March 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, below market forecasts of 2.4% but signaling a reversal from the prior five-month slowdown.[2]  
This fresh Statistics Korea data, released recently, aligns with the Bank of Korea's updated 2026 forecast of 2.2
